message.content:
# Description of the Romanian Cadastral/Architectural Document (Page 2)  

## Header & Identification  
- **Title**: *PLANUL GEOMETRIC* (Geometric Plan)  
- **Cadastral Number**: *Numărul cadastral* = **3156101.198**  


## Geometric Plan (Left Section)  
- A polygonal plot with vertices labeled **1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8** (clockwise).  
- A smaller, irregularly shaped structure (labeled **.04**) is centered within the plot.  


## Location Map (Right Section)  
- Title: *Amplasamentul bunului* (Location of the Property).  
- A small-scale map showing the plot’s position relative to neighboring properties (labeled **15, 4, 17, 17/A, 19/A, 21, 23, 25, 25/A**) and the street *str. Vasile Alecsandri*.  
- Legend:  
  - *198 - numărul cadastral al terenului* (198 = cadastral number of the land)  
  - *01 - numărul cadastral al clădirii* (01 = cadastral number of the building)  


## Technical Characteristics Table (*Caracteristicile tehnice ale bunului imobil*)  
| Nr          | Tipul bunu       | Destinația                                  | Mod de folosinta                          | Suprafata   | Mențiuni |  
|-------------|-----------------|--------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------|------------|----------|  
| 3156101.198  | Teren           | Terenuri destinate construcțiilor și amenajărilor | Teren pentru amplasarea construcțiilor locative | 0.0861 ha   | –        |  
| 3156101.198.04 | constructie    | Casa de locuit individuală                  | –                                        | 203.2 m.p.  | –        |  


## Company & Certification Section  
- **Company Name**: *Societatea cu răspundere limitată "LANDELCAD"* (Limited Liability Company "LANDELCAD").  
- **Activity**: *Lucrare cadastrală la nivel de clădire* (Cadastral work at building level).  
- **Address**: *mun. Chisinau, or. Cricova, str. Vasile Alecsandri nr. 19/A* (Municipality of Chisinau, City of Cricova, Vasile Alecsandri Street No. 19/A).  

### Signatures & Stamps  
- **Blue Stamp**: Circular, with text *REPUBLICA MOLDOVA, mun. CHISINAU, S.R.L. LANDELCAD* (Republic of Moldova, City of Chisinau, S.R.L. LANDELCAD).  
- **Conducător / Executant** (Leader/Executor): Signature + printed name *Luchianenco N.*.  
- **Verificat** (Verified): Signature + printed name *Luchianenco N.*.  

### Additional Details  
- **Data întocmirii** (Date of Preparation): *02.03.2026* (02 March 2026) – with note *data inspectării în teren* (field inspection date).  
- **Sistem de coordonate** (Coordinate System): *MoldRef99*.  
- **Scara** (Scale): *1:400*.  


## Footer  
- *Parametrii hotarului vezi verso* (Boundary parameters see reverse).  
- *Pagina 1 din 2* (Page 1 of 2).  


All text is in Romanian; measurements use metric units (hectares for land, square meters for building area). The document is a formal cadastral record for a residential plot and building in Moldova.
